value \"method : escaped quote then method then real closing quote -> bytes \"method" so "method" token present (method+closing quote); Rust method+id->request; Node response

value x\"id: wire bytes are x backslash-quote i d then real closing quote, so substring "id" (escaped-quote + id + closing-quote) IS present; Rust id=T,no method/error->response; Node no real id->unknown
